Action: Model 740/520 as competing terminal functions and test whether each predicts following/preceding slot frames.

Action: Treat 002|740 as a formal environment and test every X filler against site, object, and terminal behavior.

ExpectedBreakthrough: Opens the first controlled phonetic-test lane; turns 240+STEM into a repeatable contrast environment.

Action: Model 240 and 235 as rival opener functions and test whether each selects different terminal or entity slots.
